prestazioni: Engine: ATIWE 3.0L twin-turbocharged inline-6 (engine code: ATW-30TT), forged internals with billet crankshaft, Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression), and Manley Performance titanium valves. Turbocharger upgrade to Garrett GTX5533R Gen II with 64mm compressor wheel and 76mm turbine, paired with a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe and GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for 28 psi peak boost.

Drivetrain: OS Giken 4.11:1 final drive ratio LSD with billet differential case, reinforced half-shafts from Driveshaft Shop, and a Tilton Engineering 7.25-inch twin-disc carbon clutch with billet flywheel. Transmission: Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox with paddle shifters and a 0.035-second shift time, mated to a PWR radiator and external transmission cooler.

Suspension & Handling: Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with 2-way adjustable dampers and 30-way rebound adjustment, custom valved for ATIWE’s 50:50 weight distribution. Full poly bushings from SuperPro, including spherical bearing subframe mounts. Brembo GT-R Nismo 6-piston calipers with 420mm two-piece rotors and Pagid RSL29 brake pads. Wheel setup: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 3-piece forged wheels (19x10.5 +25 front, 19x12 +35 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/19 front, 325/30/19 rear).
estetica: Aero: Full carbon fiber Rocket Bunny Nomad R widebody kit (ATIWE-exclusive design) with integrated front canards, side skirts, and a ducktail spoiler. Front splitter: custom 3D-printed carbon fiber with active Gurney flap (adjustable via cockpit switch). Rear diffuser: APR Performance GT-400 with integrated exhaust cutouts for dual 3.5-inch titanium exhaust tips (custom-made by Akrapovic).

Exterior: Full 3M Matte Military Green wrap with satin black accents, including roof, mirrors, and lower body cladding. Custom LED headlights with Osram 5500K HID projectors and sequential turn signals (VLAND OEM+ style). Side markers: Diode Dynamics COB LED with sequential animation. Rear: custom carbon fiber license plate delete with integrated LED brake light (Lux H8 V4).

Interior: Full Recaro SPG XL bucket seats with 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses, wrapped in Alcantara and green Nappa leather (matching exterior). Custom roll cage: TIG-welded chromoly steel (ATIWE-spec) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360). Steering wheel: NRG Innovations 350mm suede wheel with quick-release hub and integrated AIM MXS Strada dash display. Pedal set: Sparco Pro 2000 with adjustable brake bias controller.
